title: SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER - 211info
text: DAVID DOUGLAS HIGH SCHOOL SBHC SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Services include routine physical exams and sports physicals, treatment of illness and injury, vision and hearing screenings, dental screenings, blood pressure screenings, immunizations, mental health services, age-appropriate reproductive health, routine lab tests, prescription medication maintenance, and health, fitness, and nutrition education and promotion. 1034 SE 130th Avenue Portland, OR 97233 Eligibility: Students K-12 Hours: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday/Friday 7:45am-1pm and 1:30pm-3:45pm, Wednesday 7:45am-1pm and 1:30pm-5:45pm Summer: Tuesday-Thursday 8:45am-1pm and 1:30pm-4:45pm June 17- August 20 (503) 988-3554 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 988-3554 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Accepts OHP, some private insurances and sliding scale fees available. Students will not be turned away for inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Income information for those applying for sliding scale fees. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Multnomah County SITE HOURS: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday/Friday 7:45am1pm and 1:30pm-3:45pm, Wednesday 7:45am-1pm and1:30pm-5:45pm Services: Childhood Immunization Dental Hygiene Dental Screening Emergency Dental Care Mental Health Evaluation * Grade School Students Sports Participation Physical Examinations Student Health Programs Vaccine Information Other Services Offered At This Location: HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. DAVID DOUGLAS HIGH SCHOOL SBHC
